children.text: Today I Want to Tell You that…

Having a great spa day would be sweet. With a gorgeous man with strong hands rubbing oils firmly everywhere. With wine and  Chocolate. Yes hot stones need those. followed by dinner and dancing to retire to a movie and COFFEE.💆💅💪🍷🍫🍤🍝🎷📺💏💗🎉 Happy Valentine's Day.
